content.content:
1→# PRO-92: Public Profile with Badges
     2→
     3→## Context
     4→
     5→User profiles lack visual recognition of achievements. Badges gamify milestones (workouts completed, streaks, consistency) and drive engagement. This feature adds a badge system to the profile tab, gated behind a Firebase Remote Config feature flag.
     6→
     7→**Linear**: PRO-92 | **Priority**: Urgent | **Estimate**: 3 points | **Branch**: `feat/public-profile-badges`
     8→
     9→---
    10→
    11→## Acceptance Criteria (from Linear)
    12→
    13→- [x] Grid 3x3 with badges
    14→- [x] Show rarity (colors)
    15→- [x] Tooltip with criteria
    16→- [x] Unlock animation
    17→- [x] Persist in Firestore
    18→- [x] Dynamic rarity (static for MVP, Cloud Function later)
    19→- [x] Privacy flag (isPublic)
    20→- [x] Sharing
    21→- [x] Feature flag in Remote Config
    22→
    23→---
    24→
    25→## Phase 1: Domain Layer — Badge Entity + Rarity
    26→
    27→### New file: `Domain/Entities/Badge.swift`
    28→
    29→**BadgeRarity** enum (follows `LeagueTier` pattern):
    30→
    31→- `common` (gray #6B7280), `rare` (blue #3B82F6), `epic` (purple #8B5CF6), `legendary` (gold #F59E0B)
    32→- Properties: `displayName` (localized), `color` (hex), `sortOrder`
    33→
    34→**BadgeType** enum (9 types for 3x3 grid):
    35→| Type | Criteria | Rarity |
    36→|------|----------|--------|
    37→| `firstWorkout` | Complete 1 workout | common |
    38→| `workouts50` | Complete 50 workouts | rare |
    39→| `workouts100` | Complete 100 workouts | epic |
    40→| `streak7` | 7-day streak | common |
    41→| `streak30` | 30-day streak | rare |
    42→| `streak100` | 100-day streak | legendary |
    43→| `earlyBird` | 5 workouts before 7 AM | rare |
    44→| `weekWarrior` | 7 workouts in a single week | epic |
    45→| `monthlyConsistency` | Train every week for 4 consecutive weeks | rare |
    46→
    47→Each has: `displayName`, `description` (criteria), `icon` (SF Symbol), `defaultRarity`
    48→
    49→> Note: "1 ton lifted" badge dropped — `CompletedExercise` lacks weight/reps data. "Challenge winner" deferred — requires leaderboard coupling.
    50→
    51→**Badge** struct:
    52→
    53→```swift
    54→struct Badge: Sendable, Identifiable, Codable, Equatable {
    55→    let id: String  // BadgeType.rawValue
    56→    let type: BadgeType
    57→    let rarity: BadgeRarity
    58→    let unlockedAt: Date?
    59→    let isPublic: Bool
    60→    var isUnlocked: Bool { unlockedAt != nil }
    61→}
    62→```
    63→
    64→### Test: `FitTodayTests/Domain/Entities/BadgeTests.swift`
    65→
    66→---
    67→
    68→## Phase 2: Feature Flag
    69→
    70→### Modify: `Domain/Entities/FeatureFlag.swift`
    71→
    72→Add under `// MARK: - Social Features`:
    73→
    74→```swift
    75→case publicProfileBadgesEnabled = "public_profile_badges_enabled"
    76→```
    77→
    78→- `displayName`: "Public Profile Badges"
    79→- `defaultValue`: `false` (unreleased)
    80→
    81→---
    82→
    83→## Phase 3: Repository Layer
    84→
    85→### New file: `Domain/Protocols/BadgeRepository.swift`
    86→
    87→```swift
    88→protocol BadgeRepository: Sendable {
    89→    func getUserBadges(userId: String) async throws -> [Badge]
    90→    func saveBadge(_ badge: Badge, userId: String) async throws
    91→    func updateBadgeVisibility(_ badgeId: String, isPublic: Bool, userId: String) async throws
    92→}
    93→```
    94→
    95→### New file: `Data/DTOs/FBBadge.swift`
    96→
    97→Firestore DTO with `toDomain()` / `fromDomain()` mappers.
    98→
    99→### New file: `Data/Repositories/FirebaseBadgeRepository.swift`
   100→
   101→- Firestore path: `users/{userId}/badges/{badgeType}`
   102→- Follows `FirebaseLeagueRepository` pattern (uses `FirebaseAuthService`)
   103→
   104→### New file: `FitTodayTests/Mocks/MockBadgeRepository.swift`
   105→
   106→Spy/stub mock following `MockLeagueRepository` pattern.
   107→
   108→### Modify: `Presentation/DI/AppContainer.swift`
   109→
   110→Register `BadgeRepository` and `BadgeEvaluationUseCase`.
   111→
   112→---
   113→
   114→## Phase 4: UseCase — Badge Evaluation
   115→
   116→### New file: `Domain/UseCases/BadgeEvaluationUseCase.swift`
   117→
   118→Dependencies: `BadgeRepository`, `WorkoutHistoryRepository`, `FeatureFlagChecking`
   119→
   120→**evaluate(userId:) -> [Badge]** (returns newly unlocked):
   121→
   122→1. Check feature flag → return `[]` if disabled
   123→2. Fetch existing badges from repository
   124→3. Fetch workout history via `historyRepository.listEntries()`
   125→4. Evaluate each `BadgeType` against history data
   126→5. Save newly unlocked badges
   127→6. Return new badges (for animation trigger)
   128→
   129→**Evaluation data sources:**
   130→
   131→- Workout count: `entries.count`
   132→- Streak: computed from sorted dates (reuse logic from `ProfileProView.loadProfileData`)
   133→- Early bird: `entries.filter { Calendar.current.component(.hour, from: $0.date) < 7 }.count >= 5`
   134→- Week warrior: group by ISO week, check any week with 7+ entries
   135→- Monthly consistency: 4 consecutive weeks each with >= 1 entry
   136→
   137→### Test: `FitTodayTests/Domain/UseCases/BadgeEvaluationUseCaseTests.swift`
   138→
   139→- Feature flag disabled → empty
   140→- First workout unlocked when count >= 1
   141→- Streak badges at correct thresholds
   142→- Already unlocked → not duplicated
   143→- Multiple badges unlocked in single evaluation
   144→
   145→---
   146→
   147→## Phase 5: Presentation
   148→
   149→### 5a. New: `Presentation/Features/Pro/Components/BadgeCardView.swift`
   150→
   151→- SF Symbol icon (grayscale if locked, rarity color if unlocked)
   152→- Badge name, rarity colored border
   153→- Lock overlay when locked
   154→
   155→### 5b. New: `Presentation/Features/Pro/Components/BadgesGridView.swift`
   156→
   157→- 3-column `LazyVGrid` with section header "Conquistas"
   158→- Accepts `[Badge]` + `onBadgeTap` closure
   159→

file.content:
# PRO-92: Public Profile with Badges

## Context

User profiles lack visual recognition of achievements. Badges gamify milestones (workouts completed, streaks, consistency) and drive engagement. This feature adds a badge system to the profile tab, gated behind a Firebase Remote Config feature flag.

**Linear**: PRO-92 | **Priority**: Urgent | **Estimate**: 3 points | **Branch**: `feat/public-profile-badges`

---

## Acceptance Criteria (from Linear)

- [x] Grid 3x3 with badges
- [x] Show rarity (colors)
- [x] Tooltip with criteria
- [x] Unlock animation
- [x] Persist in Firestore
- [x] Dynamic rarity (static for MVP, Cloud Function later)
- [x] Privacy flag (isPublic)
- [x] Sharing
- [x] Feature flag in Remote Config

---

## Phase 1: Domain Layer — Badge Entity + Rarity

### New file: `Domain/Entities/Badge.swift`

**BadgeRarity** enum (follows `LeagueTier` pattern):

- `common` (gray #6B7280), `rare` (blue #3B82F6), `epic` (purple #8B5CF6), `legendary` (gold #F59E0B)
- Properties: `displayName` (localized), `color` (hex), `sortOrder`

**BadgeType** enum (9 types for 3x3 grid):
| Type | Criteria | Rarity |
|------|----------|--------|
| `firstWorkout` | Complete 1 workout | common |
| `workouts50` | Complete 50 workouts | rare |
| `workouts100` | Complete 100 workouts | epic |
| `streak7` | 7-day streak | common |
| `streak30` | 30-day streak | rare |
| `streak100` | 100-day streak | legendary |
| `earlyBird` | 5 workouts before 7 AM | rare |
| `weekWarrior` | 7 workouts in a single week | epic |
| `monthlyConsistency` | Train every week for 4 consecutive weeks | rare |

Each has: `displayName`, `description` (criteria), `icon` (SF Symbol), `defaultRarity`

> Note: "1 ton lifted" badge dropped — `CompletedExercise` lacks weight/reps data. "Challenge winner" deferred — requires leaderboard coupling.

**Badge** struct:

```swift
struct Badge: Sendable, Identifiable, Codable, Equatable {
    let id: String  // BadgeType.rawValue
    let type: BadgeType
    let rarity: BadgeRarity
    let unlockedAt: Date?
    let isPublic: Bool
    var isUnlocked: Bool { unlockedAt != nil }
}
```

### Test: `FitTodayTests/Domain/Entities/BadgeTests.swift`

---

## Phase 2: Feature Flag

### Modify: `Domain/Entities/FeatureFlag.swift`

Add under `// MARK: - Social Features`:

```swift
case publicProfileBadgesEnabled = "public_profile_badges_enabled"
```

- `displayName`: "Public Profile Badges"
- `defaultValue`: `false` (unreleased)

---

## Phase 3: Repository Layer

### New file: `Domain/Protocols/BadgeRepository.swift`

```swift
protocol BadgeRepository: Sendable {
    func getUserBadges(userId: String) async throws -> [Badge]
    func saveBadge(_ badge: Badge, userId: String) async throws
    func updateBadgeVisibility(_ badgeId: String, isPublic: Bool, userId: String) async throws
}
```

### New file: `Data/DTOs/FBBadge.swift`

Firestore DTO with `toDomain()` / `fromDomain()` mappers.

### New file: `Data/Repositories/FirebaseBadgeRepository.swift`

- Firestore path: `users/{userId}/badges/{badgeType}`
- Follows `FirebaseLeagueRepository` pattern (uses `FirebaseAuthService`)

### New file: `FitTodayTests/Mocks/MockBadgeRepository.swift`

Spy/stub mock following `MockLeagueRepository` pattern.

### Modify: `Presentation/DI/AppContainer.swift`

Register `BadgeRepository` and `BadgeEvaluationUseCase`.

---

## Phase 4: UseCase — Badge Evaluation

### New file: `Domain/UseCases/BadgeEvaluationUseCase.swift`

Dependencies: `BadgeRepository`, `WorkoutHistoryRepository`, `FeatureFlagChecking`

**evaluate(userId:) -> [Badge]** (returns newly unlocked):

1. Check feature flag → return `[]` if disabled
2. Fetch existing badges from repository
3. Fetch workout history via `historyRepository.listEntries()`
4. Evaluate each `BadgeType` against history data
5. Save newly unlocked badges
6. Return new badges (for animation trigger)

**Evaluation data sources:**

- Workout count: `entries.count`
- Streak: computed from sorted dates (reuse logic from `ProfileProView.loadProfileData`)
- Early bird: `entries.filter { Calendar.current.component(.hour, from: $0.date) < 7 }.count >= 5`
- Week warrior: group by ISO week, check any week with 7+ entries
- Monthly consistency: 4 consecutive weeks each with >= 1 entry

### Test: `FitTodayTests/Domain/UseCases/BadgeEvaluationUseCaseTests.swift`

- Feature flag disabled → empty
- First workout unlocked when count >= 1
- Streak badges at correct thresholds
- Already unlocked → not duplicated
- Multiple badges unlocked in single evaluation

---

## Phase 5: Presentation

### 5a. New: `Presentation/Features/Pro/Components/BadgeCardView.swift`

- SF Symbol icon (grayscale if locked, rarity color if unlocked)
- Badge name, rarity colored border
- Lock overlay when locked

### 5b. New: `Presentation/Features/Pro/Components/BadgesGridView.swift`

- 3-column `LazyVGrid` with section header "Conquistas"
- Accepts `[Badge]` + `onBadgeTap` closure

### 5c. New: `Presentation/Features/Pro/Components/BadgeDetailSheet.swift`

- Large icon, name, rarity label with color
- Criteria description, unlock date
- Share button (ImageRenderer → UIActivityViewController)
- isPublic toggle → calls `updateBadgeVisibility`

### 5d. New: `Presentation/Features/Pro/BadgesViewModel.swift`

```swift
@MainActor @Observable
final class BadgesViewModel {
    private(set) var badges: [Badge] = []
    private(set) var isLoading = false
    private(set) var newlyUnlockedBadges: [Badge] = []
    var selectedBadge: Badge?
}
```

### 5e. Modify: `Presentation/Features/Pro/ProfileProView.swift`

- Add `@State private var isBadgesEnabled = false`
- Add `@State private var badgesViewModel: BadgesViewModel?`
- Insert `BadgesGridView` between `ProfileStatsRow` and `premiumCard` (behind flag)
- Check flag in `.task`
- Add `.sheet` for badge detail

### 5f. Unlock Animation

- Scale-from-zero + glow overlay when `newlyUnlockedBadges` is non-empty
- Simple `withAnimation(.spring)` approach

### Localization: Add to `Localizable.strings`

- Badge rarity keys: `badge.rarity.common`, `.rare`, `.epic`, `.legendary`
- Badge type keys: `badge.type.firstWorkout`, etc.
- Section: `badge.section.title` = "Conquistas"
- `badge.locked`, `badge.criteria.prefix`, `badge.unlocked_at`

---

## Files Summary

### New Files (11)

| File                                                              | Layer        |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------ |
| `Domain/Entities/Badge.swift`                                     | Domain       |
| `Domain/Protocols/BadgeRepository.swift`                          | Domain       |
| `Domain/UseCases/BadgeEvaluationUseCase.swift`                    | Domain       |
| `Data/DTOs/FBBadge.swift`                                         | Data         |
| `Data/Repositories/FirebaseBadgeRepository.swift`                 | Data         |
| `Presentation/Features/Pro/BadgesViewModel.swift`                 | Presentation |
| `Presentation/Features/Pro/Components/BadgesGridView.swift`       | Presentation |
| `Presentation/Features/Pro/Components/BadgeCardView.swift`        | Presentation |
| `Presentation/Features/Pro/Components/BadgeDetailSheet.swift`     | Presentation |
| `FitTodayTests/Domain/Entities/BadgeTests.swift`                  | Tests        |
| `FitTodayTests/Domain/UseCases/BadgeEvaluationUseCaseTests.swift` | Tests        |

### Modified Files (3)

| File                                             | Change                             |
| ------------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------- |
| `Domain/Entities/FeatureFlag.swift`              | Add `publicProfileBadgesEnabled`   |
| `Presentation/Features/Pro/ProfileProView.swift` | Integrate BadgesGridView           |
| `Presentation/DI/AppContainer.swift`             | Register BadgeRepository + UseCase |

### Mock Files (1)

| File                                            | Purpose     |
| ----------------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `FitTodayTests/Mocks/MockBadgeRepository.swift` | Test double |

---

## Key Reference Files

- `Domain/Entities/LeagueTier.swift` — pattern for rarity enum (colors, sortOrder)
- `Data/Repositories/FirebaseLeagueRepository.swift` — pattern for Firestore repo
- `Domain/Entities/HistoryModels.swift` — WorkoutHistoryEntry structure
- `Domain/Entities/WorkoutRating.swift` — CompletedExercise (no weight data)
- `Presentation/Features/Pro/ProfileProView.swift` — integration point
- `Presentation/DI/AppContainer.swift` — DI registration pattern

---

## Verification

1. **Build**: `mcp__xcodebuildmcp__build_sim_name_proj` — project compiles
2. **Tests**: `mcp__xcodebuildmcp__test_sim_name_proj` — all tests pass, badge tests included
3. **Feature flag off**: Badges grid hidden on profile
4. **Feature flag on**: Badges grid visible, shows 9 badges (locked/unlocked)
5. **Badge detail**: Tap badge → sheet with criteria, rarity, share, privacy toggle
6. **Code review**: Run swift-reviewer agent
7. **Commit & PR**: Conventional commit, PR to main

file.content:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: FitToday CMS API
  description: |
    API for the FitToday fitness CMS platform. Connects personal trainers with students
    through programs, workouts, and real-time communication.

    ## Authentication
    All protected endpoints require a Firebase Auth token in the Authorization header:
    ```
    Authorization: Bearer <firebase-id-token>
    ```

    ## Roles
    - **trainer** - Personal trainers who create programs and manage students
    - **student** - Students who follow programs and track progress
    - **admin** - Platform administrators

    ## Plans
    | Plan    | Price (BRL) | Commission | Max Programs | Max Students |
    |---------|-------------|------------|--------------|--------------|
    | Starter | Free        | 10%        | 3            | 5            |
    | Pro     | R$97/mo     | 5%         | Unlimited    | Unlimited    |
    | Elite   | R$197/mo    | 0%         | Unlimited    | Unlimited    |
  version: 1.0.0
  contact:
    name: FitToday Engineering

servers:
  - url: https://fittoday.vercel.app
    description: Production
  - url: http://localhost:3001
    description: Local development

tags:
  - name: Users
    description: User profile management
  - name: Trainers
    description: Trainer discovery and public profiles
  - name: Students
    description: Student registration, workouts, progress, and analytics
  - name: Connections
    description: Trainer-student connection requests
  - name: Programs
    description: Training program CRUD
  - name: Exercises
    description: Exercise library management
  - name: Workouts
    description: Workout assignment and tracking
  - name: Chats
    description: Chat room management
  - name: Notifications
    description: In-app notification management
  - name: Stripe
    description: Payments, subscriptions, and Stripe Connect
  - name: Admin
    description: Platform administration (admin role required)

components:
  securitySchemes:
    BearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
      bearerFormat: Firebase ID Token
      description: Firebase Authentication ID token

  schemas:
    Error:
      type: object
      properties:
        error:
          type: string
        code:
          type: string
      required:
        - error

    # ---- Users ----
    UserProfile:
      type: object
      properties:
        uid:
          type: string
        role:
          type: string
          enum: [trainer, student, admin]
        displayName:
          type: string
        photoURL:
          type: string
        email:
          type: string
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    CreateUserRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        role:
          type: string
          enum: [student]
          description: Only "student" is accepted. Trainer onboarding has its own flow.
        displayName:
          type: string
        photoURL:
          type: string

    # ---- Trainers ----
    PublicTrainerProfile:
      type: object
      properties:
        uid:
          type: string
        displayName:
          type: string
        photoURL:
          type: string
        profile:
          type: object
          properties:
            bio:
              type: string
            specialties:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
            experience:
              type: integer
            location:
              type: object
              properties:
                city:
                  type: string
                state:
                  type: string
        store:
          type: object
          properties:
            rating:
              type: number
            totalReviews:
              type: integer
            totalStudents:
              type: integer

    TrainerListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        trainers:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PublicTrainerProfile"
        total:
          type: integer
        hasMore:
          type: boolean

    TrainerCountResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        total:
          type: integer

    # ---- Connections ----
    ConnectionRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        trainerId:
          type: string
        studentId:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [pending, active, rejected, cancelled]
        source:
          type: string
        message:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        respondedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        cancelledAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        cancelledBy:
          type: string
          nullable: true
          enum: [trainer, student]
        cancellationReason:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        student:
          type: object
          nullable: true
          properties:
            uid:
              type: string
            displayName:
              type: string
            email:
              type: string
            photoURL:
              type: string
              nullable: true

    ConnectionStatusResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        isConnected:
          type: boolean
        status:
          type: string
          nullable: true
          enum: [pending, active, rejected, cancelled]
        connectionId:
          type: string
        trainerId:
          type: string
        studentId:
          type: string

    ConnectionActionRequest:
      type: object
      required:
        - action
      properties:
        action:
          type: string
          enum: [accept, reject, cancel]
        reason:
          type: string
          maxLength: 500
          description: Optional reason (for cancel action)

    # ---- Reviews ----
    Review:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        studentName:
          type: string
        studentPhotoURL:
          type: string
        rating:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1
          maximum: 5
        comment:
          type: string
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    ReviewListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        reviews:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Review"
        total:
          type: integer
        averageRating:
          type: number

    CreateReviewRequest:
      type: object
      required:
        - rating
      properties:
        rating:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1
          maximum: 5
        comment:
          type: string
          maxLength: 500

    # ---- Students ----
    RegisterStudentRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        displayName:
          type: string
        email:
          type: string
        photoURL:
          type: string
        fcmToken:
          type: string
          description: Firebase Cloud Messaging token for push notifications
        trainerId:
          type: string
          description: Optional trainer to link with on registration

    StudentWorkout:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        trainerId:
          type: string
        studentId:
          type: string
        title:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        pdfUrl:
          type: string
        durationWeeks:
          type: integer
        totalDays:
          type: integer
        startDate:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, archived, completed]
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        progress:
          type: object
          nullable: true
        feedbackCount:
          type: integer

    StudentWorkoutListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        workouts:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/StudentWorkout"
        total:
          type: integer

    # ---- Progress ----
    ProgressEntry:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        trainerId:
          type: string
        studentId:
          type: string
        date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        measurements:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Measurements"
        photos:
          type: object
          properties:
            front:
              type: string
            side:
              type: string
            back:
              type: string
        notes:
          type: string
        registeredBy:
          type: string
          enum: [trainer]
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    Measurements:
      type: object
      properties:
        weight:
          type: number
          nullable: true
        bodyFat:
          type: number
          nullable: true
        muscleMass:
          type: number
          nullable: true
        chest:
          type: number
          nullable: true
        waist:
          type: number
          nullable: true
        hips:
          type: number
          nullable: true
        rightArm:
          type: number
          nullable: true
        leftArm:
          type: number
          nullable: true
        rightThigh:
          type: number
          nullable: true
        leftThigh:
          type: number
          nullable: true
        rightCalf:
          type: number
          nullable: true
        leftCalf:
          type: number
          nullable: true

    CreateProgressRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        date:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today.
        measurements:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Measurements"
        photos:
          type: object
          properties:
            front:
              type: string
            side:
              type: string
            back:
              type: string
        notes:
          type: string

    # ---- Analytics ----
    StudentAnalyticsResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        workoutData:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              date:
                type: string
                format: date-time
              workoutName:
                type: string
              duration:
                type: integer
              intensity:
                type: string
                enum: [low, medium, high]
              exercises:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: object
                  properties:
                    name:
                      type: string
                    weight:
                      type: number
                    sets:
                      type: integer
                    reps:
                      type: integer

    # ---- Programs ----
    Program:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        trainerId:
          type: string
        studentId:
          type: string
        title:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        coverImageURL:
          type: string
        previewVideoURL:
          type: string
        workoutPdfUrl:
          type: string
        category:
          type: string
        tags:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        difficulty:
          type: string
          enum: [beginner, intermediate, advanced]
        duration:
          type: object
          properties:
            weeks:
              type: integer
            daysPerWeek:
              type: integer
            avgSessionMinutes:
              type: integer
        requirements:
          type: object
          properties:
            equipment:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
            fitnessLevel:
              type: string
            prerequisites:
              type: string
        content:
          type: object
          properties:
            totalWorkouts:
              type: integer
            totalExercises:
              type: integer
            includesNutrition:
              type: boolean
            includesSupplements:
              type: boolean
            hasVideoGuides:
              type: boolean
        stats:
          type: object
          properties:
            totalSales:
              type: integer
            activeStudents:
              type: integer
            completionRate:
              type: number
            averageRating:
              type: number
            totalReviews:
              type: integer
        weeks:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [draft, published, archived]
        visibility:
          type: string
          enum: [public, private]
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        publishedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true

    CreateProgramRequest:
      type: object
      required:
        - title
        - description
      properties:
        title:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        studentId:
          type: string
        coverImageURL:
          type: string
        previewVideoURL:
          type: string
        category:
          type: string
        tags:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        difficulty:
          type: string
          enum: [beginner, intermediate, advanced]
          default: intermediate
        duration:
          type: object
          properties:
            weeks:
              type: integer
              default: 8
            daysPerWeek:
              type: integer
              default: 4
            avgSessionMinutes:
              type: integer
              default: 60
        requirements:
          type: object
          properties:
            equipment:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
            prerequisites:
              type: string
        content:
          type: object
          properties:
            totalWorkouts:
              type: integer
            totalExercises:
              type: integer
            includesNutrition:
              type: boolean
            includesSupplements:
              type: boolean
            hasVideoGuides:
              type: boolean
        weeks:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [draft, published]
          default: draft
        visibility:
          type: string
          enum: [public, private]
          default: public

    # ---- Exercises ----
    Exercise:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        name:
          type: object
          properties:
            en:
              type: string
            pt:
              type: string
        aliases:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        description:
          type: string
        category:
          type: string
        muscleGroups:
          type: object
          properties:
            primary:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
            secondary:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
        equipment:
          type: string
        force:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        level:
          type: string
          enum: [beginner, intermediate, advanced]
        mechanic:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        instructions:
          type: object
          properties:
            en:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
            pt:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
        media:
          type: object
          properties:
            thumbnailURL:
              type: string
            images:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
            gifURL:
              type: string
              nullable: true
            videoURL:
              type: string
              nullable: true
        source:
          type: string
          enum: [system, trainer]
        trainerId:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        isActive:
          type: boolean
        isApproved:
          type: boolean
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    CreateExerciseRequest:
      type: object
      required:
        - name
        - category
        - equipment
      properties:
        name:
          type: object
          required:
            - en
            - pt
          properties:
            en:
              type: string
            pt:
              type: string
        aliases:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        description:
          type: string
        category:
          type: string
        muscleGroups:
          type: object
          properties:
            primary:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
            secondary:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
        equipment:
          type: string
        force:
          type: string
        level:
          type: string
          enum: [beginner, intermediate, advanced]
          default: intermediate
        mechanic:
          type: string
        instructions:
          type: object
          properties:
            en:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
            pt:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
        media:
          type: object
          properties:
            thumbnailURL:
              type: string
            images:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
            gifURL:
              type: string
            videoURL:
              type: string
        wgerBaseId:
          type: integer

    # ---- Workouts ----
    Workout:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        trainerId:
          type: string
        studentId:
          type: string
        title:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        pdfUrl:
          type: string
        pdfPath:
          type: string
        durationWeeks:
          type: integer
        totalDays:
          type: integer
        startDate:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, archived, completed]
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    WorkoutProgressResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        workoutId:
          type: string
        completedDays:
          type: array
          items:
            type: integer
        totalDays:
          type: integer
        percentComplete:
          type: integer
        currentStreak:
          type: integer
        longestStreak:
          type: integer
        lastActivityAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    WorkoutFeedback:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        workoutId:
          type: string
        studentId:
          type: string
        message:
          type: string
        trainerResponse:
          type: string
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        respondedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    ReplyToFeedbackRequest:
      type: object
      required:
        - feedbackId
        - response
      properties:
        feedbackId:
          type: string
        response:
          type: string

    # ---- Chats ----
    ChatRoom:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        trainerId:
          type: string
        studentId:
          type: string
        isActive:
          type: boolean
        lastMessage:
          type: string
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    # ---- Notifications ----
    Notification:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        type:
          type: string
        title:
          type: string
        body:
          type: string
        isRead:
          type: boolean
        actor:
          type: object
          properties:
            id:
              type: string
            name:
              type: string
            avatar:
              type: string
        action:
          type: object
          properties:
            type:
              type: string
            destination:
              type: string
        relatedEntityType:
          type: string
        relatedEntityId:
          type: string
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    # ---- Stripe ----
    CheckoutRequest:
      type: object
      required:
        - programId
        - trainerId
        - trainerStripeAccountId
        - studentId
      properties:
        programId:
          type: string
        programName:
          type: string
        programDescription:
          type: string
        price:
          type: integer
          description: Price in cents (e.g. 9900 for R$99.00). Required for mode=payment.
        priceId:
          type: string
          description: Stripe Price ID. Required for mode=subscription.
        currency:
          type: string
          default: brl
        mode:
          type: string
          enum: [payment, subscription]
          default: payment
        trainerId:
          type: string
        trainerStripeAccountId:
          type: string
        studentId:
          type: string
        studentEmail:
          type: string
        successUrl:
          type: string
        cancelUrl:
          type: string

    CheckoutResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        sessionId:
          type: string
        url:
          type: string
        mode:
          type: string
          enum: [payment, subscription]
        platformFee:
          type: integer
          description: Only for payment mode
        trainerEarnings:
          type: integer
          description: Only for payment mode

    StripeConnectRequest:
      type: object
      required:
        - trainerId
        - email
      properties:
        trainerId:
          type: string
        email:
          type: string
        existingAccountId:
          type: string
        returnUrl:
          type: string

    StripeAccountStatus:
      type: object
      properties:
        connected:
          type: boolean
        onboardingComplete:
          type: boolean
        chargesEnabled:
          type: boolean
        payoutsEnabled:
          type: boolean
        accountId:
          type: string
        email:
          type: string
        detailsSubmitted:
          type: boolean

    PlatformCheckoutRequest:
      type: object
      required:
        - plan
      properties:
        plan:
          type: string
          enum: [pro, elite]

    PlatformSubscriptionResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        plan:
          type: string
          enum: [starter, pro, elite]
        status:
          type: string
          nullable: true
          enum: [active, canceled, past_due, trialing]
        currentPeriodEnd:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        cancelAtPeriodEnd:
          type: boolean
        stripeSubscriptionId:
          type: string

    # ---- Admin ----
    AdminTrainerListItem:
      type: object
      properties:
        uid:
          type: string
        email:
          type: string
        displayName:
          type: string
        photoURL:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [pending, active, suspended, rejected]
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        statusUpdatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        profile:
          type: object
          properties:
            bio:
              type: string
            specialties:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
            experience:
              type: integer
        store:
          type: object
          properties:
            totalStudents:
              type: integer
            totalSales:
              type: integer

    AdminTrainerListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        trainers:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/AdminTrainerListItem"
        total:
          type: integer
        pending:
          type: integer
        active:
          type: integer
        suspended:
          type: integer

    PlatformMetrics:
      type: object
      properties:
        trainers:
          type: object
          properties:
            total:
              type: integer
            pending:
              type: integer
            active:
              type: integer
            suspended:
              type: integer
            rejected:
              type: integer
        students:
          type: object
          properties:
            total:
              type: integer
        programs:
          type: object
          properties:
            total:
              type: integer
            published:
              type: integer
            draft:
              type: integer
        workouts:
          type: object
          properties:
            total:
              type: integer
        financial:
          type: object
          properties:
            totalRevenue:
              type: number
            pendingPayouts:
              type: number
        recentActivity:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              type:
                type: string
              description:
                type: string
              timestamp:
                type: string
                format: date-time
              userId:
                type: string

paths:
  # ================================================================
  # USERS
  # ================================================================
  /api/users/me:
    get:
      tags: [Users]
      summary: Get authenticated user profile
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      responses:
        "200":
          description: User profile
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/UserProfile"
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
        "404":
          description: User not found
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"

    post:
      tags: [Users]
      summary: Create or update user profile (post-signup)
      description: |
        Called after Firebase signup. Creates a new user profile or updates an existing one.
        Only the "student" role can be set here; trainer onboarding has its own flow.
        If the user already exists with a different role, returns existing profile without changes.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateUserRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Profile already exists (updated or unchanged)
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/UserProfile"
        "201":
          description: New profile created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/UserProfile"
        "400":
          description: Invalid role
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"

  # ================================================================
  # TRAINERS
  # ================================================================
  /api/trainers:
    get:
      tags: [Trainers]
      summary: List active trainers (public)
      security: []
      description: Returns paginated list of active trainers, sorted by rating descending.
      parameters:
        - name: limit
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            default: 20
            maximum: 50
        - name: offset
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            default: 0
        - name: specialty
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Filter by specialty (array-contains)
        - name: city
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Filter by city (case-insensitive)
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Trainer list
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/TrainerListResponse"

  /api/trainers/{id}:
    get:
      tags: [Trainers]
      summary: Get trainer public profile
      security: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Trainer profile
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/PublicTrainerProfile"
        "404":
          description: Trainer not found or not active
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"

  /api/trainers/count:
    get:
      tags: [Trainers]
      summary: Get total active trainer count (public)
      security: []
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Trainer count
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/TrainerCountResponse"

  /api/trainers/{id}/connect:
    post:
      tags: [Trainers]
      summary: Request connection with trainer
      description: |
        Student requests to connect with a trainer. Creates a pending connection request.
        If a previous connection was rejected/cancelled, deletes the old one and creates a new one
        (to trigger Firebase onCreate push notification).
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Trainer ID
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                message:
                  type: string
                  maxLength: 500
                  description: Optional message to the trainer
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Connection request created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  id:
                    type: string
                  trainerId:
                    type: string
                  studentId:
                    type: string
                  status:
                    type: string
                    enum: [pending]
        "200":
          description: Already connected or pending
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  id:
                    type: string
                  status:
                    type: string
                  alreadyConnected:
                    type: boolean
                  alreadyPending:
                    type: boolean
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "403":
          description: Only students/admins can connect
        "404":
          description: Trainer not found

    get:
      tags: [Trainers]
      summary: Check connection status with trainer
      description: Returns the connection status between the authenticated student and a trainer.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Trainer ID
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Connection status
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectionStatusResponse"
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized

  /api/trainers/{id}/reviews:
    get:
      tags: [Trainers]
      summary: List trainer reviews (public)
      security: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: limit
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            default: 20
            maximum: 50
        - name: offset
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            default: 0
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Review list with average rating
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ReviewListResponse"
        "404":
          description: Trainer not found

    post:
      tags: [Trainers]
      summary: Submit or update a review
      description: |
        Only students who have/had a relationship with the trainer (via subscription or workout)
        can leave a review. Upserts if the student already has a review.
        Recalculates the trainer's average rating atomically.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateReviewRequest"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Review created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  id:
                    type: string
                  createdAt:
                    type: string
                    format: date-time
        "200":
          description: Review updated
        "400":
          description: Invalid rating or comment too long
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "403":
          description: Not a student, self-review, or not enrolled

  # ================================================================
  # STUDENTS
  # ================================================================
  /api/students:
    post:
      tags: [Students]
      summary: Register a student
      description: |
        Registers a student with their Firebase UID. If the user already exists,
        updates FCM token and trainerId. Creates a subscription link if trainerId is provided.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/RegisterStudentRequest"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Student created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                allOf:
                  - $ref: "#/components/schemas/UserProfile"
                  - type: object
                    properties:
                      id:
                        type: string
                      created:
                        type: boolean
                        enum: [true]
        "200":
          description: Student already exists (updated)
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                allOf:
                  - $ref: "#/components/schemas/UserProfile"
                  - type: object
                    properties:
                      id:
                        type: string
                      created:
                        type: boolean
                        enum: [false]
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized

  /api/students/workouts:
    get:
      tags: [Students]
      summary: List workouts for authenticated student
      description: Returns all workouts assigned to the authenticated student, with progress and feedback count.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [active, archived, completed]
        - name: limit
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            default: 50
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Student workout list
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/StudentWorkoutListResponse"
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "403":
          description: Not a student

  /api/students/{id}/progress:
    get:
      tags: [Students]
      summary: List progress entries for a student
      description: Trainer-only. Lists body measurement and photo progress entries.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Student ID
        - name: limit
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            default: 50
            maximum: 100
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Progress entries
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  entries:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProgressEntry"
                  total:
                    type: integer
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized (trainer only)

    post:
      tags: [Students]
      summary: Create a progress entry
      description: |
        Trainer-only. Supports multipart/form-data for photo uploads (photo_front, photo_side, photo_back)
        or JSON with photo URLs. Photos must be JPEG, PNG, or WebP, max 10MB each.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Student ID
      requestBody:
        content:
          multipart/form-data:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                data:
                  type: string
                  description: JSON string of CreateProgressRequest
                photo_front:
                  type: string
                  format: binary
                photo_side:
                  type: string
                  format: binary
                photo_back:
                  type: string
                  format: binary
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateProgressRequest"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Progress entry created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  id:
                    type: string
                  createdAt:
                    type: string
                    format: date-time
        "400":
          description: Invalid photo type or size
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized (trainer only)

  /api/students/{id}/analytics:
    get:
      tags: [Students]
      summary: Get student workout analytics
      description: Trainer-only. Returns workout completion data with exercises, weights, and intensity.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Student ID
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Analytics data
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/StudentAnalyticsResponse"
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized (trainer only)

  # ================================================================
  # CONNECTIONS
  # ================================================================
  /api/connections:
    get:
      tags: [Connections]
      summary: List connection requests for trainer
      description: Trainer-only. Returns connection requests enriched with student info.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [pending, active, rejected, cancelled]
            default: pending
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Connection list
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  connections:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectionRequest"
                  total:
                    type: integer
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "403":
          description: Trainer only

  /api/connections/{id}:
    patch:
      tags: [Connections]
      summary: Respond to a connection request
      description: |
        - **accept/reject**: Only the trainer who owns the connection can respond. Connection must be pending.
        - **cancel**: Either the trainer or student can cancel. If active, cleans up subscription, chat, and student link.
        Sends notifications to the other party.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectionActionRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Action completed
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  id:
                    type: string
                  status:
                    type: string
                  subscriptionId:
                    type: string
                    description: Only on accept
                  chatRoomId:
                    type: string
                    description: Only on accept
                  cancelledBy:
                    type: string
                    description: Only on cancel
                  reason:
                    type: string
                    description: Only on cancel
        "400":
          description: Invalid action
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "403":
          description: Forbidden
        "404":
          description: Connection not found
        "409":
          description: Already responded or already cancelled

  # ================================================================
  # PROGRAMS
  # ================================================================
  /api/programs:
    get:
      tags: [Programs]
      summary: List programs
      security: []
      description: |
        If trainerId is provided, lists that trainer's programs (any status).
        Without trainerId, returns only published+public programs (marketplace).
      parameters:
        - name: trainerId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: studentId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [draft, published, archived]
        - name: visibility
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [public, private]
        - name: category
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: limit
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            default: 50
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Program list
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  programs:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: "#/components/schemas/Program"
                  total:
                    type: integer

    post:
      tags: [Programs]
      summary: Create a program
      description: |
        Trainer-only. Supports multipart/form-data for cover image, PDF, and video uploads.
        Validates program limit based on trainer's plan (Starter: max 3).
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        content:
          multipart/form-data:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                data:
                  type: string
                  description: JSON string of CreateProgramRequest
                cover:
                  type: string
                  format: binary
                  description: Cover image (JPEG/PNG/WebP, max 10MB)
                pdf:
                  type: string
                  format: binary
                  description: Workout PDF (max 10MB)
                video:
                  type: string
                  format: binary
                  description: Preview video (max 100MB)
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateProgramRequest"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Program created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  id:
                    type: string
                  coverImageURL:
                    type: string
                  createdAt:
                    type: string
                    format: date-time
        "400":
          description: Missing required fields or invalid file
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "403":
          description: Program limit reached (upgrade plan)
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  error:
                    type: string
                  code:
                    type: string
                    enum: [PROGRAM_LIMIT_REACHED]

  /api/programs/{id}:
    get:
      tags: [Programs]
      summary: Get a program
      security: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Program details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Program"
        "404":
          description: Program not found

    put:
      tags: [Programs]
      summary: Update a program
      description: Trainer-only. Updates only provided fields. Supports multipart for file uploads.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        content:
          multipart/form-data:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                data:
                  type: string
                  description: JSON string with fields to update
                cover:
                  type: string
                  format: binary
                pdf:
                  type: string
                  format: binary
                video:
                  type: string
                  format: binary
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateProgramRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Program updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  id:
                    type: string
                  coverImageURL:
                    type: string
                  updatedAt:
                    type: string
                    format: date-time
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "403":
          description: Not the program owner
        "404":
          description: Program not found

    delete:
      tags: [Programs]
      summary: Archive a program (soft delete)
      description: |
        Trainer-only. Sets status to "archived" and visibility to "private".
        Cannot delete programs with active students.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Program archived
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  id:
                    type: string
                  status:
                    type: string
                    enum: [archived]
        "400":
          description: Cannot delete with active students
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "403":
          description: Not the program owner
        "404":
          description: Program not found

  /api/programs/{id}/duplicate:
    post:
      tags: [Programs]
      summary: Duplicate a program
      description: Trainer-only. Creates a draft copy with "(Copia)" appended to the title, resetting stats.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Program duplicated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  id:
                    type: string
                  title:
                    type: string
                  createdAt:
                    type: string
                    format: date-time
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "403":
          description: Not the program owner
        "404":
          description: Program not found

  # ================================================================
  # EXERCISES
  # ================================================================
  /api/exercises:
    get:
      tags: [Exercises]
      summary: List exercises with filters
      security: []
      description: Returns exercises sorted by name.pt ascending. In-memory search when "search" param is used.
      parameters:
        - name: category
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: equipment
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: source
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [system, trainer]
        - name: level
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [beginner, intermediate, advanced]
        - name: isActive
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: ["true", "false", "all"]
            default: "true"
        - name: trainerId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: search
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Search across name.pt, name.en, and aliases
        - name: limit
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            default: 50
        - name: offset
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            default: 0
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Exercise list
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  exercises:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: "#/components/schemas/Exercise"
                  total:
                    type: integer

    post:
      tags: [Exercises]
      summary: Create a trainer exercise
      description: Trainer-only. ID is auto-generated from slugified name.en.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateExerciseRequest"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Exercise created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  id:
                    type: string
                  createdAt:
                    type: string
                    format: date-time
        "400":
          description: Missing required fields
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized

  /api/exercises/{id}:
    get:
      tags: [Exercises]
      summary: Get a single exercise
      security: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Exercise details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Exercise"
        "404":
          description: Exercise not found

    patch:
      tags: [Exercises]
      summary: Update an exercise
      description: Trainer-only. Only the exercise owner can update trainer exercises.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateExerciseRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated exercise
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Exercise"
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "403":
          description: Not the exercise owner
        "404":
          description: Exercise not found

    delete:
      tags: [Exercises]
      summary: Soft delete exercise (set isActive=false)
      description: Trainer-only. Only the exercise owner can delete.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Exercise deactivated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  success:
                    type: boolean
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "403":
          description: Not the exercise owner
        "404":
          description: Exercise not found

  /api/exercises/search:
    get:
      tags: [Exercises]
      summary: Search exercises
      security: []
      description: Full-text search across name.pt, name.en, and aliases. Requires the "q" parameter.
      parameters:
        - name: q
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Search query
        - name: limit
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            default: 20
        - name: category
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: equipment
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Search results
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  exercises:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: "#/components/schemas/Exercise"
                  total:
                    type: integer
        "400":
          description: Missing query parameter

  /api/exercises/prompt-list:
    get:
      tags: [Exercises]
      summary: Get compact exercise list for AI prompts
      security: []
      description: |
        Returns exercises in plain text format: `id|name_pt|category|equipment` (one per line).
        Cached for 1 hour. Used by AI to generate workout plans.
      parameters:
        - name: equipment
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Comma-separated equipment filter (e.g. "barbell,dumbbell")
        - name: category
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Compact text list
          content:
            text/plain:
              schema:
                type: string
                example: |
                  bench-press-abc123|Supino reto|chest|barbell
                  squat-def456|Agachamento|legs|barbell

  # ================================================================
  # WORKOUTS
  # ================================================================
  /api/workouts:
    post:
      tags: [Workouts]
      summary: Create a workout
      description: |
        Trainer-only. Requires a file upload (PDF, JPG, or PNG).
        Validates student limit based on trainer's plan.
        Sends push notification to the student.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          multipart/form-data:
            schema:
              type: object
              required:
                - file
                - studentId
                - title
              properties:
                file:
                  type: string
                  format: binary
                  description: PDF (max 10MB) or image (JPG/PNG, max 5MB)
                studentId:
                  type: string
                title:
                  type: string
                description:
                  type: string
                durationWeeks:
                  type: integer
                totalDays:
                  type: integer
                  description: Defaults to durationWeeks * 7, or 28
                startDate:
                  type: string
                  format: date
                  description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD)
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Workout created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  id:
                    type: string
                  pdfUrl:
                    type: string
                  createdAt:
                    type: string
                    format: date-time
        "400":
          description: Missing fields, invalid file type, or file too large
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "403":
          description: Student limit reached (upgrade plan)
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  error:
                    type: string
                  code:
                    type: string
                    enum: [STUDENT_LIMIT_REACHED]

    get:
      tags: [Workouts]
      summary: List workouts for trainer
      description: Trainer-only. Returns workouts with progress and feedback count.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: studentId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Filter by student
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [active, archived, completed]
        - name: limit
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            default: 50
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Workout list
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  workouts:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: "#/components/schemas/Workout"
                  total:
                    type: integer
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized

  /api/workouts/{id}:
    get:
      tags: [Workouts]
      summary: Get workout details
      description: Trainer-only. Regenerates signed PDF URL if expired.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Workout with progress and feedback count
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Workout"
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "403":
          description: Not the workout owner
        "404":
          description: Workout not found

    patch:
      tags: [Workouts]
      summary: Update a workout
      description: Trainer-only. Allowed fields - title, description, status, durationWeeks, totalDays, startDate.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                title:
                  type: string
                description:
                  type: string
                status:
                  type: string
                  enum: [active, archived, completed]
                durationWeeks:
                  type: integer
                totalDays:
                  type: integer
                startDate:
                  type: string
                  format: date
                  description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD)
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated workout
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Workout"
        "400":
          description: Invalid startDate format
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "403":
          description: Not the workout owner
        "404":
          description: Workout not found

    delete:
      tags: [Workouts]
      summary: Delete a workout
      description: |
        Trainer-only. Default is soft delete (archive).
        Use ?hard=true for permanent deletion (removes PDF, progress, and feedback).
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
