      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: hard
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: ["true"]
          description: Set to "true" for permanent deletion
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Workout deleted/archived
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  message:
                    type: string
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "403":
          description: Not the workout owner
        "404":
          description: Workout not found

  /api/workouts/{id}/progress:
    get:
      tags: [Workouts]
      summary: Get workout progress
      description: Trainer-only. Returns day-by-day completion tracking.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Progress data
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/WorkoutProgressResponse"
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "403":
          description: Not the workout owner
        "404":
          description: Workout not found

  /api/workouts/{id}/feedback:
    get:
      tags: [Workouts]
      summary: List feedback for a workout
      description: Trainer-only. Returns all student feedback with optional trainer responses.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Feedback list
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  feedbacks:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: "#/components/schemas/WorkoutFeedback"
                  total:
                    type: integer
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "403":
          description: Not the workout owner
        "404":
          description: Workout not found

    post:
      tags: [Workouts]
      summary: Reply to student feedback
      description: Trainer-only. Adds a trainer response to an existing feedback entry.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ReplyToFeedbackRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Response added
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/WorkoutFeedback"
        "400":
          description: Missing feedbackId/response or feedback doesn't belong to workout
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "403":
          description: Not the workout owner
        "404":
          description: Workout or feedback not found

  # ================================================================
  # CHATS
  # ================================================================
  /api/chats:
    get:
      tags: [Chats]
      summary: Check if chat room exists
      description: Returns the chat room for a trainer-student pair. Only participants can query.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: trainerId
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: studentId
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Chat room status
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  exists:
                    type: boolean
                  chatRoom:
                    nullable: true
                    type: object
                    description: Chat room object or null if not found
                    properties:
                      id:
                        type: string
                      trainerId:
                        type: string
                      studentId:
                        type: string
                      isActive:
                        type: boolean
                      lastMessage:
                        type: string
                      createdAt:
                        type: string
                        format: date-time
        "400":
          description: Missing trainerId or studentId
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "403":
          description: Not a participant

  # ================================================================
  # NOTIFICATIONS
  # ================================================================
  /api/notifications:
    get:
      tags: [Notifications]
      summary: List notifications
      description: Returns notifications for the authenticated user, sorted by createdAt desc.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: limit
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            default: 20
            minimum: 1
            maximum: 100
        - name: unreadOnly
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: ["true"]
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Notification list
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  notifications:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: "#/components/schemas/Notification"
                  total:
                    type: integer
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized

    patch:
      tags: [Notifications]
      summary: Mark all notifications as read
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required:
                - action
              properties:
                action:
                  type: string
                  enum: [markAllRead]
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Notifications marked as read
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  success:
                    type: boolean
                  updated:
                    type: integer
        "400":
          description: Invalid action
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized

  /api/notifications/{id}:
    patch:
      tags: [Notifications]
      summary: Mark a single notification as read
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Notification marked as read
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  success:
                    type: boolean
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized
        "404":
          description: Notification not found

  # ================================================================
  # STRIPE
  # ================================================================
  /api/stripe/checkout:
    post:
      tags: [Stripe]
      summary: Create checkout session for program purchase
      security: []
      description: |
        Creates a Stripe Checkout session for purchasing a trainer's program.
        Supports both one-time payment (card, boleto, pix) and subscription modes.
        Platform fee is automatically calculated.
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CheckoutRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Checkout session created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CheckoutResponse"
        "400":
          description: Missing required fields

    get:
      tags: [Stripe]
      summary: Get checkout session details
      security: []
      parameters:
        - name: sessionId
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Session details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  id:
                    type: string
                  status:
                    type: string
                  mode:
                    type: string
                  paymentStatus:
                    type: string
                  amountTotal:
                    type: integer
                  currency:
                    type: string
                  customerEmail:
                    type: string
                  metadata:
                    type: object
                  subscription:
                    type: object
                    nullable: true
                    properties:
                      id:
                        type: string
                      status:
                        type: string
                      currentPeriodEnd:
                        type: integer
        "400":
          description: Missing sessionId

  /api/stripe/connect:
    post:
      tags: [Stripe]
      summary: Create Stripe Connect account for trainer
      security: []
      description: Creates a Stripe Connect Express account and returns the onboarding URL.
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/StripeConnectRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Account created with onboarding URL
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  url:
                    type: string
                    description: Stripe onboarding URL
                  accountId:
                    type: string
        "400":
          description: Missing required fields

    get:
      tags: [Stripe]
      summary: Get Stripe Connect account status
      security: []
      parameters:
        - name: accountId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Account status
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/StripeAccountStatus"

  /api/stripe/account:
    get:
      tags: [Stripe]
      summary: Get Stripe account balance and transactions
      security: []
      description: Returns balance, recent payouts, charges, and total earnings for a connected account.
      parameters:
        - name: accountId
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Account details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  account:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      id:
                        type: string
                      email:
                        type: string
                      chargesEnabled:
                        type: boolean
                      payoutsEnabled:
                        type: boolean
                      detailsSubmitted:
                        type: boolean
                  balance:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      available:
                        type: integer
                      pending:
                        type: integer
                      currency:
                        type: string
                  payouts:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: object
                      properties:
                        id:
                          type: string
                        amount:
                          type: integer
                        status:
                          type: string
                        arrivalDate:
                          type: string
                          format: date-time
                        createdAt:
                          type: string
                          format: date-time
                  recentCharges:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: object
                      properties:
                        id:
                          type: string
                        amount:
                          type: integer
                        status:
                          type: string
                        paid:
                          type: boolean
                        refunded:
                          type: boolean
                        description:
                          type: string
                        createdAt:
                          type: string
                          format: date-time
                  totalEarnings:
                    type: integer
        "400":
          description: Missing accountId

    post:
      tags: [Stripe]
      summary: Create Stripe Express dashboard login link
      security: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required:
                - accountId
              properties:
                accountId:
                  type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Login link
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  url:
                    type: string
        "400":
          description: Missing accountId

  /api/stripe/products:
    post:
      tags: [Stripe]
      summary: Create a Stripe product for a program
      security: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required:
                - programId
                - name
                - trainerId
                - trainerStripeAccountId
              properties:
                programId:
                  type: string
                name:
                  type: string
                description:
                  type: string
                trainerId:
                  type: string
                trainerStripeAccountId:
                  type: string
                imageUrl:
                  type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Product created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  productId:
                    type: string
                  name:
                    type: string
                  description:
                    type: string
                  active:
                    type: boolean
        "400":
          description: Missing required fields

    get:
      tags: [Stripe]
      summary: Get a Stripe product
      security: []
      parameters:
        - name: productId
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: stripeAccountId
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Product details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  productId:
                    type: string
                  name:
                    type: string
                  description:
                    type: string
                  active:
                    type: boolean
                  metadata:
                    type: object
        "400":
          description: Missing required params

  /api/stripe/prices:
    post:
      tags: [Stripe]
      summary: Create a price for a product
      security: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required:
                - productId
                - programId
                - trainerId
                - trainerStripeAccountId
                - unitAmount
              properties:
                productId:
                  type: string
                programId:
                  type: string
                trainerId:
                  type: string
                trainerStripeAccountId:
                  type: string
                unitAmount:
                  type: integer
                  description: Price in cents
                currency:
                  type: string
                  default: brl
                recurring:
                  type: object
                  properties:
                    interval:
                      type: string
                      enum: [month, year]
                    intervalCount:
                      type: integer
                      default: 1
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Price created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  priceId:
                    type: string
                  productId:
                    type: string
                  unitAmount:
                    type: integer
                  currency:
                    type: string
                  type:
                    type: string
                  recurring:
                    type: object
                    nullable: true
                    properties:
                      interval:
                        type: string
                      intervalCount:
                        type: integer
                  active:
                    type: boolean
        "400":
          description: Missing required fields

    get:
      tags: [Stripe]
      summary: List prices for a product
      security: []
      parameters:
        - name: productId
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: stripeAccountId
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Price list
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  prices:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: object
                      properties:
                        priceId:
                          type: string
                        productId:
                          type: string
                        unitAmount:
                          type: integer
                        currency:
                          type: string
                        type:
                          type: string
                        recurring:
                          type: object
                          nullable: true
                        active:
                          type: boolean
        "400":
          description: Missing required params

  /api/stripe/platform-checkout:
    post:
      tags: [Stripe]
      summary: Create platform subscription checkout (Pro/Elite)
      description: |
        Trainer-only. Creates a Stripe Checkout session for subscribing to a platform plan.
        Gets or creates a Stripe Customer for the trainer.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/PlatformCheckoutRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Checkout URL
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  url:
                    type: string
        "400":
          description: Invalid plan
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized (trainer only)

  /api/stripe/platform-subscription:
    get:
      tags: [Stripe]
      summary: Get trainer's platform subscription status
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Subscription details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/PlatformSubscriptionResponse"
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized (trainer only)

    delete:
      tags: [Stripe]
      summary: Cancel platform subscription
      description: Cancels at period end (not immediately). Trainer keeps access until current period expires.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Subscription cancelled
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  success:
                    type: boolean
                  cancelAtPeriodEnd:
                    type: boolean
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized (trainer only)
        "404":
          description: No active subscription

  /api/stripe/webhook:
    post:
      tags: [Stripe]
      summary: Stripe webhook handler
      security: []
      description: |
        Handles Stripe webhook events. Requires stripe-signature header for verification.

        **Handled events:**
        - `account.updated` - Update trainer's Stripe account status
        - `checkout.session.completed` - Process program purchase or platform subscription
        - `invoice.paid` / `invoice.payment_succeeded` - Renew subscriptions
        - `invoice.payment_failed` - Mark subscriptions as past_due
        - `customer.subscription.updated` - Sync subscription status
        - `customer.subscription.deleted` - Cancel subscriptions and revoke access
        - `transfer.created` - Update trainer balance
        - `charge.refunded` - Process refunds
      parameters:
        - name: stripe-signature
          in: header
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Webhook processed
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  received:
                    type: boolean
        "400":
          description: Invalid signature

  # ================================================================
  # ADMIN
  # ================================================================
  /api/admin/trainers:
    get:
      tags: [Admin]
      summary: List all trainers with filters
      description: Admin-only. Returns all trainers with status counts.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [pending, active, suspended, rejected, all]
        - name: search
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Search by name or email
        - name: limit
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            default: 50
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Trainer list with counts
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/AdminTrainerListResponse"
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized (admin only)

  /api/admin/trainers/{id}:
    get:
      tags: [Admin]
      summary: Get trainer details
      description: Admin-only. Includes student, program, and workout counts.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Trainer details with stats
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                allOf:
                  - $ref: "#/components/schemas/UserProfile"
                  - type: object
                    properties:
                      stats:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          studentsCount:
                            type: integer
                          programsCount:
                            type: integer
                          workoutsCount:
                            type: integer
        "400":
          description: User is not a trainer
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized (admin only)
        "404":
          description: Trainer not found

  /api/admin/trainers/{id}/approve:
    post:
      tags: [Admin]
      summary: Approve a trainer
      description: Admin-only. Sets trainer status to "active".
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Trainer approved
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  success:
                    type: boolean
                  message:
                    type: string
                  trainerId:
                    type: string
                  status:
                    type: string
                    enum: [active]
        "400":
          description: Not a trainer or already active
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized (admin only)
        "404":
          description: Trainer not found

  /api/admin/trainers/{id}/reject:
    post:
      tags: [Admin]
      summary: Reject a trainer
      description: Admin-only. Sets trainer status to "rejected".
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                reason:
                  type: string
                  description: Optional rejection reason
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Trainer rejected
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  success:
                    type: boolean
                  message:
                    type: string
                  trainerId:
                    type: string
                  status:
                    type: string
                    enum: [rejected]
                  reason:
                    type: string
                    nullable: true
        "400":
          description: Not a trainer or already rejected
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized (admin only)
        "404":
          description: Trainer not found

  /api/admin/trainers/{id}/suspend:
    post:
      tags: [Admin]
      summary: Suspend a trainer
      description: Admin-only. Sets trainer status to "suspended".
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                reason:
                  type: string
                  description: Optional suspension reason
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Trainer suspended
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  success:
                    type: boolean
                  message:
                    type: string
                  trainerId:
                    type: string
                  status:
                    type: string
                    enum: [suspended]
                  reason:
                    type: string
                    nullable: true
        "400":
          description: Not a trainer or already suspended
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized (admin only)
        "404":
          description: Trainer not found

  /api/admin/subscriptions:
    get:
      tags: [Admin]
      summary: List all trainer subscriptions
      description: Admin-only. Returns trainers with their plan info and calculates MRR.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Subscription overview
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  trainers:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: object
                      properties:
                        id:
                          type: string
                        name:
                          type: string
                        email:
                          type: string
                        plan:
                          type: string
                          enum: [starter, pro, elite]
                        subscriptionStatus:
                          type: string
                          nullable: true
                        createdAt:
                          type: string
                          format: date-time
                          nullable: true
                  summary:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      total:
                        type: integer
                      starter:
                        type: integer
                      pro:
                        type: integer
                      elite:
                        type: integer
                      pastDue:
                        type: integer
                      mrrCents:
                        type: integer
                        description: Monthly Recurring Revenue in cents (BRL)
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized (admin only)

  /api/admin/metrics:
    get:
      tags: [Admin]
      summary: Get platform metrics
      description: Admin-only. Returns comprehensive platform metrics including trainer/student/program/workout counts, financial data, and recent activity.
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Platform metrics
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/PlatformMetrics"
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized (admin only)

1→     1→openapi: 3.0.3
     2→     2→info:
     3→     3→  title: FitToday CMS API
     4→     4→  description: |
     5→     5→    API for the FitToday fitness CMS platform. Connects personal trainers with students
     6→     6→    through programs, workouts, and real-time communication.
     7→     7→
     8→     8→    ## Authentication
     9→     9→    All protected endpoints require a Firebase Auth token in the Authorization header:
    10→    10→    ```
    11→    11→    Authorization: Bearer <firebase-id-token>
    12→    12→    ```
    13→    13→
    14→    14→    ## Roles
    15→    15→    - **trainer** - Personal trainers who create programs and manage students
    16→    16→    - **student** - Students who follow programs and track progress
    17→    17→    - **admin** - Platform administrators
    18→    18→
    19→    19→    ## Plans
    20→    20→    | Plan    | Price (BRL) | Commission | Max Programs | Max Students |
    21→    21→    |---------|-------------|------------|--------------|--------------|
    22→    22→    | Starter | Free        | 10%        | 3            | 5            |
    23→    23→    | Pro     | R$97/mo     | 5%         | Unlimited    | Unlimited    |
    24→    24→    | Elite   | R$197/mo    | 0%         | Unlimited    | Unlimited    |
    25→    25→  version: 1.0.0
    26→    26→  contact:
    27→    27→    name: FitToday Engineering
    28→    28→
    29→    29→servers:

    31→    31→    description: Production

    33→    33→    description: Local development
    34→    34→
    35→    35→tags:
    36→    36→  - name: Users

file.content:
1→openapi: 3.0.3
     2→info:
     3→  title: FitToday CMS API
     4→  description: |
     5→    API for the FitToday fitness CMS platform. Connects personal trainers with students
     6→    through programs, workouts, and real-time communication.
     7→
     8→    ## Authentication
     9→    All protected endpoints require a Firebase Auth token in the Authorization header:
    10→    ```
    11→    Authorization: Bearer <firebase-id-token>
    12→    ```
    13→
    14→    ## Roles
    15→    - **trainer** - Personal trainers who create programs and manage students
    16→    - **student** - Students who follow programs and track progress
    17→    - **admin** - Platform administrators
    18→
    19→    ## Plans
    20→    | Plan    | Price (BRL) | Commission | Max Programs | Max Students |
    21→    |---------|-------------|------------|--------------|--------------|
    22→    | Starter | Free        | 10%        | 3            | 5            |
    23→    | Pro     | R$97/mo     | 5%         | Unlimited    | Unlimited    |
    24→    | Elite   | R$197/mo    | 0%         | Unlimited    | Unlimited    |
    25→  version: 1.0.0
    26→  contact:
    27→    name: FitToday Engineering
    28→
    29→servers:
    30→  - url: https://fittoday.vercel.app
    31→    description: Production
    32→  - url: http://localhost:3001
    33→    description: Local development
    34→
    35→tags:
    36→  - name: Users
    37→    description: User profile management
    38→  - name: Trainers
    39→    description: Trainer discovery and public profiles
    40→  - name: Students
    41→    description: Student registration, workouts, progress, and analytics
    42→  - name: Connections
    43→    description: Trainer-student connection requests
    44→  - name: Programs
    45→    description: Training program CRUD
    46→  - name: Exercises
    47→    description: Exercise library management
    48→  - name: Workouts
    49→    description: Workout assignment and tracking
    50→  - name: Chats
    51→    description: Chat room management
    52→  - name: Notifications
    53→    description: In-app notification management
    54→  - name: Stripe
    55→    description: Payments, subscriptions, and Stripe Connect
    56→  - name: Admin
    57→    description: Platform administration (admin role required)
    58→
    59→components:
    60→  securitySchemes:
    61→    BearerAuth:
    62→      type: http
    63→      scheme: bearer
    64→      bearerFormat: Firebase ID Token
    65→      description: Firebase Authentication ID token
    66→
    67→  schemas:
    68→    Error:
    69→      type: object
    70→      properties:
    71→        error:
    72→          type: string
    73→        code:
    74→          type: string
    75→      required:
    76→        - error
    77→
    78→    # ---- Users ----
    79→    UserProfile:
    80→      type: object
    81→      properties:
    82→        uid:
    83→          type: string
    84→        role:
    85→          type: string
    86→          enum: [trainer, student, admin]
    87→        displayName:
    88→          type: string
    89→        photoURL:
    90→          type: string
    91→        email:
    92→          type: string
    93→        createdAt:
    94→          type: string
    95→          format: date-time
    96→        updatedAt:
    97→          type: string
    98→          format: date-time
    99→
   100→    CreateUserRequest:
   101→      type: object
   102→      properties:
   103→        role:
   104→          type: string
   105→          enum: [student]
   106→          description: Only "student" is accepted. Trainer onboarding has its own flow.
   107→        displayName:
   108→          type: string
   109→        photoURL:
   110→          type: string
   111→
   112→    # ---- Trainers ----
   113→    PublicTrainerProfile:
   114→      type: object
   115→      properties:
   116→        uid:
   117→          type: string
   118→        displayName:
   119→          type: string
   120→        photoURL:
   121→          type: string
   122→        profile:
   123→          type: object
   124→          properties:
   125→            bio:
   126→              type: string
   127→            specialties:
   128→              type: array
   129→              items:
   130→                type: string
   131→            experience:
   132→              type: integer
   133→            location:
   134→              type: object
   135→              properties:
   136→                city:
   137→                  type: string
   138→                state:
   139→                  type: string
   140→        store:
   141→          type: object
   142→          properties:
   143→            rating:
   144→              type: number
   145→            totalReviews:
   146→              type: integer
   147→            totalStudents:
   148→              type: integer
   149→
   150→    TrainerListResponse:
   151→      type: object
   152→      properties:
   153→        trainers:
   154→          type: array
   155→          items:
   156→            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PublicTrainerProfile"
   157→        total:
   158→          type: integer

   161→
   162→    TrainerCountResponse:

   166→          type: integer
   167→
   168→    # ---- Connections ----
   169→    ConnectionRequest:
   170→      type: object

   173→          type: string

   175→          type: string
   176→        studentId:
   177→          type: string
   178→        status:
   179→          type: string
   180→          enum: [pending, active, rejected, cancelled]
   181→        source:
   182→          type: string
   183→        message:
   184→          type: string
   185→          nullable: true
   186→        createdAt:
   187→          type: string
   188→          format: date-time
   189→        updatedAt:
   190→          type: string
   191→          format: date-time
   192→        respondedAt:
   193→          type: string
   194→          format: date-time
   195→          nullable: true
   196→        cancelledAt:
   197→          type: string
   198→          format: date-time
   199→          nullable: true
   200→        cancelledBy:

   204→        cancellationReason:
   205→          type: string

   207→        student:

   209→          nullable: true
   210→          properties:

   212→              type: string
   213→            displayName:
   214→              type: string
   215→            email:
   216→              type: string
   217→            photoURL:
   218→              type: string
   219→              nullable: true
   220→
   221→    ConnectionStatusResponse:
   222→      type: object
   223→      properties:

   225→          type: boolean
   226→        status:
   227→          type: string
   228→          nullable: true
   229→          enum: [pending, active, rejected, cancelled]
   230→        connectionId:
   231→          type: string
   232→        trainerId:
   233→          type: string
   234→        studentId:
   235→          type: string
   236→
   237→    ConnectionActionRequest:
   238→      type: object
   239→      required:
   240→        - action
   241→      properties:
   242→        action:
   243→          type: string
   244→          enum: [accept, reject, cancel]
   245→        reason:
   246→          type: string
   247→          maxLength: 500
   248→          description: Optional reason (for cancel action)
   249→
   250→    # ---- Reviews ----
   251→    Review:
   252→      type: object
   253→      properties:
   254→        id:
   255→          type: string
   256→        studentName:
   257→          type: string
   258→        studentPhotoURL:
   259→          type: string
   260→        rating:
   261→          type: integer
   262→          minimum: 1
   263→          maximum: 5
   264→        comment:
   265→          type: string

   267→          type: string
   268→          format: date-time
   269→
   270→    ReviewListResponse:
   271→      type: object
   272→      properties:
   273→        reviews:
   274→          type: array
   275→          items:
   276→            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Review"
   277→        total:
   278→          type: integer
   279→        averageRating:
   280→          type: number
   281→
   282→    CreateReviewRequest:
   283→      type: object
   284→      required:
   285→        - rating
   286→      properties:
   287→        rating:
   288→          type: integer
   289→          minimum: 1
   290→          maximum: 5
   291→        comment:
   292→          type: string
   293→          maxLength: 500
   294→
   295→    # ---- Students ----
   296→    RegisterStudentRequest:
   297→      type: object
   298→      properties:
   299→        displayName:
   300→          type: string
   301→        email:
   302→          type: string
   303→        photoURL:
   304→          type: string
   305→        fcmToken:
   306→          type: string
   307→          description: Firebase Cloud Messaging token for push notifications
   308→        trainerId:
   309→          type: string
   310→          description: Optional trainer to link with on registration
   311→
   312→    StudentWorkout:
   313→      type: object
   314→      properties:
   315→        id:
   316→          type: string
   317→        trainerId:
   318→          type: string
   319→        studentId:
   320→          type: string
   321→        title:
   322→          type: string
   323→        description:
   324→          type: string

   326→          type: string
   327→        durationWeeks:

   329→        totalDays:

   331→        startDate:

   334→        status:

   337→        createdAt:

   339→          format: date-time
   340→        progress:

  1220→  1220→        Called after Firebase signup. Creates a new user profile or updates an existing one.
  1221→  1221→        Only the "student" role can be set here; trainer onboarding has its own flow.
  1222→  1222→        If the user already exists with a different role, returns existing profile without changes.

  1224→  1224→        - BearerAuth: []
  1225→  1225→      requestBody:

  1227→  1227→          application/json:
  1228→  1228→            schema:
  1229→  1229→              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateUserRequest"
  1230→  1230→      responses:

  1695→  1695→  /api/connections:

  1699→  1699→      description: Trainer-only. Returns connection requests enriched with student info.
  1700→  1700→      security:
  1701→  1701→        - BearerAuth: []
  1702→  1702→      parameters:
  1703→  1703→        - name: status
  1704→  1704→          in: query
  1705→  1705→          schema:
  1706→  1706→            type: string
  1707→  1707→            enum: [pending, active, rejected, cancelled]
  1708→  1708→            default: pending
  1709→  1709→      responses:
  1710→  1710→        "200":
  1711→  1711→          description: Connection list
  1712→  1712→          content:
  1713→  1713→            application/json:
  1714→  1714→              schema:
  1715→  1715→                type: object
  1716→  1716→                properties:

  1721→  1721→                  total:
  1722→  1722→                    type: integer
  1723→  1723→        "401":
  1724→  1724→          description: Unauthorized
  1725→  1725→        "403":
  1726→  1726→          description: Trainer only
  1727→  1727→
  1728→  1728→  /api/connections/{id}:
  1729→  1729→    patch:
  1730→  1730→      tags: [Connections]
  1731→  1731→      summary: Respond to a connection request
  1732→  1732→      description: |
  1733→  1733→        - **accept/reject**: Only the trainer who owns the connection can respond. Connection must be pending.
  1734→  1734→        - **cancel**: Either the trainer or student can cancel. If active, cleans up subscription, chat, and student link.
  1735→  1735→        Sends notifications to the other party.
  1736→  1736→      security:
  1737→  1737→        - BearerAuth: []
  1738→  1738→      parameters:
  1739→  1739→        - name: id
  1740→  1740→          in: path
  1741→  1741→          required: true
  1742→  1742→          schema:
  1743→  1743→            type: string
  1744→  1744→      requestBody:
  1745→  1745→        required: true
  1746→  1746→        content:
  1747→  1747→          application/json:
  1748→  1748→            schema:
  1749→  1749→              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectionActionRequest"
  1750→  1750→      responses:
  1751→  1751→        "200":
  1752→  1752→          description: Action completed
  1753→  1753→          content:
  1754→  1754→            application/json:
  1755→  1755→              schema:
  1756→  1756→                type: object
  1757→  1757→                properties:
  1758→  1758→                  id:
  1759→  1759→                    type: string
  1760→  1760→                  status:
  1761→  1761→                    type: string
  1762→  1762→                  subscriptionId:
  1763→  1763→                    type: string
  1764→  1764→                    description: Only on accept
  1765→  1765→                  chatRoomId:
  1766→  1766→                    type: string
  1767→  1767→                    description: Only on accept
  1768→  1768→                  cancelledBy:
  1769→  1769→                    type: string
  1770→  1770→                    description: Only on cancel
  1771→  1771→                  reason:
  1772→  1772→                    type: string
  1773→  1773→                    description: Only on cancel
  1774→  1774→        "400":
  1775→  1775→          description: Invalid action
  1776→  1776→        "401":
  1777→  1777→          description: Unauthorized
  1778→  1778→        "403":
  1779→  1779→          description: Forbidden
  1780→  1780→        "404":
  1781→  1781→          description: Connection not found
  1782→  1782→        "409":
  1783→  1783→          description: Already responded or already cancelled

  1187→  # ================================================================

  1190→  /api/users/me:
  1191→    get:
  1192→      tags: [Users]
  1193→      summary: Get authenticated user profile
  1194→      security:
  1195→        - BearerAuth: []
  1196→      responses:
  1197→        "200":
  1198→          description: User profile
  1199→          content:
  1200→            application/json:
  1201→              schema:
  1202→                $ref: "#/components/schemas/UserProfile"
  1203→        "401":
  1204→          description: Unauthorized
  1205→          content:
  1206→            application/json:
  1207→              schema:
  1208→                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
  1209→        "404":
  1210→          description: User not found
  1211→          content:
  1212→            application/json:
  1213→              schema:
  1214→                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
  1215→
  1216→    post:
  1217→      tags: [Users]
  1218→      summary: Create or update user profile (post-signup)
  1219→      description: |
  1220→        Called after Firebase signup. Creates a new user profile or updates an existing one.
  1221→        Only the "student" role can be set here; trainer onboarding has its own flow.
  1222→        If the user already exists with a different role, returns existing profile without changes.
  1223→      security:
  1224→        - BearerAuth: []
  1225→      requestBody:
  1226→        content:
  1227→          application/json:
  1228→            schema:
  1229→              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateUserRequest"
  1230→      responses:
  1231→        "200":
  1232→          description: Profile already exists (updated or unchanged)
  1233→          content:
  1234→            application/json:
  1235→              schema:
  1236→                $ref: "#/components/schemas/UserProfile"
  1237→        "201":
  1238→          description: New profile created
  1239→          content:
  1240→            application/json:
  1241→              schema:
  1242→                $ref: "#/components/schemas/UserProfile"
  1243→        "400":
  1244→          description: Invalid role
  1245→          content:
  1246→            application/json:
  1247→              schema:
  1248→                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
  1249→        "401":
  1250→          description: Unauthorized
  1251→          content:
  1252→            application/json:
  1253→              schema:
  1254→                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"

  1259→  /api/trainers:

  1269→            type: integer

  1274→          schema:
  1275→            type: integer

  1280→            type: string

  1333→  /api/trainers/{id}/connect:
  1334→    post:
  1335→      tags: [Trainers]
  1336→      summary: Request connection with trainer
  1337→      description: |
  1338→        Student requests to connect with a trainer. Creates a pending connection request.
  1339→        If a previous connection was rejected/cancelled, deletes the old one and creates a new one
  1340→        (to trigger Firebase onCreate push notification).

  1342→        - BearerAuth: []

  1344→        - name: id
  1345→          in: path
  1346→          required: true
  1347→          schema:
  1348→            type: string
  1349→          description: Trainer ID
  1350→      requestBody:
  1351→        content:
  1352→          application/json:
  1353→            schema:
  1354→              type: object
  1355→              properties:
  1356→                message:
  1357→                  type: string
  1358→                  maxLength: 500
  1359→                  description: Optional message to the trainer
  1360→      responses:
  1361→        "201":
  1362→          description: Connection request created
  1363→          content:
  1364→            application/json:
  1365→              schema:
  1366→                type: object
  1367→                properties:
  1368→                  id:
  1369→                    type: string
  1370→                  trainerId:
  1371→                    type: string
  1372→                  studentId:
  1373→                    type: string
  1374→                  status:
  1375→                    type: string
  1376→                    enum: [pending]
  1377→        "200":
  1378→          description: Already connected or pending
  1379→          content:
  1380→            application/json:
  1381→              schema:
  1382→                type: object
  1383→                properties:
  1384→                  id:
  1385→                    type: string
  1386→                  status:
  1387→                    type: string
  1388→                  alreadyConnected:
  1389→                    type: boolean
  1390→                  alreadyPending:
  1391→                    type: boolean
  1392→        "401":
  1393→          description: Unauthorized
  1394→        "403":
  1395→          description: Only students/admins can connect
  1396→        "404":
  1397→          description: Trainer not found
  1398→
  1399→    get:

  1425→      summary: List trainer reviews (public)

  1454→    post:

  1466→          required: true
  1467→          schema:
  1468→            type: string
  1469→      requestBody:
  1470→        required: true
  1471→        content:
  1472→          application/json:
  1473→            schema:
  1474→              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateReviewRequest"

  1492→        "401":
  1493→          description: Unauthorized
  1494→        "403":
  1495→          description: Not a student, self-review, or not enrolled

  1643→                  format: binary

  1692→  # ================================================================
  1693→  # CONNECTIONS
  1694→  # ================================================================
  1695→  /api/connections:
  1696→    get:
  1697→      tags: [Connections]
  1698→      summary: List connection requests for trainer
  1699→      description: Trainer-only. Returns connection requests enriched with student info.
  1700→      security:
  1701→        - BearerAuth: []
  1702→      parameters:
  1703→        - name: status
  1704→          in: query
  1705→          schema:
  1706→            type: string
  1707→            enum: [pending, active, rejected, cancelled]
  1708→            default: pending
  1709→      responses:
  1710→        "200":
  1711→          description: Connection list
  1712→          content:
  1713→            application/json:
  1714→              schema:
  1715→                type: object
  1716→                properties:
  1717→                  connections:
  1718→                    type: array
  1719→                    items:
  1720→                      $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectionRequest"
  1721→                  total:
  1722→                    type: integer
  1723→        "401":
  1724→          description: Unauthorized
  1725→        "403":
  1726→          description: Trainer only
  1727→
  1728→  /api/connections/{id}:
  1729→    patch:
  1730→      tags: [Connections]
  1731→      summary: Respond to a connection request
  1732→      description: |
  1733→        - **accept/reject**: Only the trainer who owns the connection can respond. Connection must be pending.
  1734→        - **cancel**: Either the trainer or student can cancel. If active, cleans up subscription, chat, and student link.
  1735→        Sends notifications to the other party.
  1736→      security:
  1737→        - BearerAuth: []
  1738→      parameters:
  1739→        - name: id
  1740→          in: path
  1741→          required: true
  1742→          schema:
  1743→            type: string
  1744→      requestBody:
  1745→        required: true
  1746→        content:
  1747→          application/json:
  1748→            schema:
  1749→              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectionActionRequest"
  1750→      responses:
  1751→        "200":
  1752→          description: Action completed
  1753→          content:
  1754→            application/json:
  1755→              schema:
  1756→                type: object
  1757→                properties:
  1758→                  id:
  1759→                    type: string
  1760→                  status:
  1761→                    type: string
  1762→                  subscriptionId:
  1763→                    type: string
  1764→                    description: Only on accept
  1765→                  chatRoomId:
  1766→                    type: string
  1767→                    description: Only on accept
  1768→                  cancelledBy:

1→//
     2→//  CMSTrainerService.swift
     3→//  FitToday
     4→//
     5→//  Actor-based service for CMS Trainer & Program API endpoints.
     6→//
     7→
     8→import Foundation
     9→
    10→actor CMSTrainerService {
    11→
    12→    // MARK: - Properties
    13→
    14→    private let session: URLSession
    15→    private let configuration: CMSConfiguration
    16→    private let tokenProvider: CMSTokenProvider?
    17→    private let decoder: JSONDecoder
    18→    private let encoder: JSONEncoder
    19→
    20→    // MARK: - Initialization
    21→
    22→    init(configuration: CMSConfiguration = .default, tokenProvider: CMSTokenProvider? = nil) {
    23→        self.configuration = configuration
    24→        self.tokenProvider = tokenProvider
    25→
    26→        let sessionConfig = URLSessionConfiguration.default
    27→        sessionConfig.timeoutIntervalForRequest = configuration.timeout
    28→        sessionConfig.timeoutIntervalForResource = configuration.timeout * 2
    29→        self.session = URLSession(configuration: sessionConfig)
    30→
    31→        self.decoder = JSONDecoder()
    32→        self.decoder.dateDecodingStrategy = .iso8601
    33→
    34→        self.encoder = JSONEncoder()
    35→        self.encoder.dateEncodingStrategy = .iso8601
    36→    }
    37→
    38→    // MARK: - Trainers API
    39→
    40→    /// GET /api/trainers — List active trainers (marketplace).
    41→    func fetchTrainers(
    42→        limit: Int = 20,
    43→        offset: Int = 0,
    44→        specialty: String? = nil,
    45→        city: String? = nil
    46→    ) async throws -> CMSTrainerListResponse {
    47→        var components = URLComponents(url: configuration.baseURL.appendingPathComponent("/api/trainers"), resolvingAgainstBaseURL: true)!
    48→        components.queryItems = [
    49→            URLQueryItem(name: "limit", value: String(limit)),
    50→            URLQueryItem(name: "offset", value: String(offset))
    51→        ]
    52→        if let specialty, !specialty.isEmpty {
    53→            components.queryItems?.append(URLQueryItem(name: "specialty", value: specialty))
    54→        }
    55→        if let city, !city.isEmpty {
    56→            components.queryItems?.append(URLQueryItem(name: "city", value: city))
    57→        }
    58→        guard let url = components.url else { throw CMSServiceError.invalidURL }
    59→        let request = try await buildRequest(url: url, method: "GET")
    60→        return try await execute(request: request)
    61→    }
    62→
    63→    /// GET /api/trainers/count — Total active trainers.
    64→    func fetchTrainerCount() async throws -> CMSTrainerCountResponse {
    65→        let url = configuration.baseURL.appendingPathComponent("/api/trainers/count")
    66→        let request = try await buildRequest(url: url, method: "GET")
    67→        return try await execute(request: request)
    68→    }
    69→
    70→    /// GET /api/trainers/[id] — Public trainer profile.
    71→    func fetchTrainer(id: String) async throws -> CMSTrainer {
    72→        let url = configuration.baseURL.appendingPathComponent("/api/trainers/\(id)")
    73→        let request = try await buildRequest(url: url, method: "GET")
    74→        return try await execute(request: request)
    75→    }
    76→
    77→    /// GET /api/trainers/[id]/reviews — Trainer reviews.
    78→    func fetchTrainerReviews(
    79→        trainerId: String,
    80→        limit: Int = 20,
    81→        offset: Int = 0
    82→    ) async throws -> CMSTrainerReviewListResponse {
    83→        var components = URLComponents(url: configuration.baseURL.appendingPathComponent("/api/trainers/\(trainerId)/reviews"), resolvingAgainstBaseURL: true)!
    84→        components.queryItems = [
    85→            URLQueryItem(name: "limit", value: String(limit)),
    86→            URLQueryItem(name: "offset", value: String(offset))
    87→        ]
    88→        guard let url = components.url else { throw CMSServiceError.invalidURL }
    89→        let request = try await buildRequest(url: url, method: "GET")
    90→        return try await execute(request: request)
    91→    }
    92→
    93→    // MARK: - Connection API
    94→
    95→    /// POST /api/trainers/[id]/connect — Request connection with a trainer.
    96→    func requestConnection(
    97→        trainerId: String,
    98→        connection: CMSConnectionRequest
    99→    ) async throws -> CMSConnectionResponse {
   100→        let url = configuration.baseURL.appendingPathComponent("/api/trainers/\(trainerId)/connect")
   101→        var request = try await buildRequest(url: url, method: "POST", requiresAuth: true)
   102→        request.httpBody = try encoder.encode(connection)
   103→        return try await execute(request: request)
   104→    }
   105→
   106→    /// GET /api/trainers/[id]/connect — Check connection status with a trainer.
   107→    func checkConnectionStatus(
   108→        trainerId: String,
   109→        studentId: String
   110→    ) async throws -> CMSConnectionStatusResponse {
   111→        var components = URLComponents(url: configuration.baseURL.appendingPathComponent("/api/trainers/\(trainerId)/connect"), resolvingAgainstBaseURL: true)!
   112→        components.queryItems = [
   113→            URLQueryItem(name: "studentId", value: studentId)
   114→        ]
   115→        guard let url = components.url else { throw CMSServiceError.invalidURL }
   116→        let request = try await buildRequest(url: url, method: "GET", requiresAuth: true)
   117→        return try await execute(request: request)
   118→    }
   119→
   120→    // MARK: - Reviews API
   121→
   122→    /// POST /api/trainers/[id]/reviews — Submit a review for a trainer.
   123→    func submitReview(
   124→        trainerId: String,
   125→        review: CMSCreateReviewRequest
   126→    ) async throws -> CMSTrainerReview {
   127→        let url = configuration.baseURL.appendingPathComponent("/api/trainers/\(trainerId)/reviews")
   128→        var request = try await buildRequest(url: url, method: "POST", requiresAuth: true)
   129→        request.httpBody = try encoder.encode(review)
   130→        return try await execute(request: request)
   131→    }
   132→
   133→    // MARK: - Programs API
   134→
   135→    /// GET /api/programs — List published programs.
   136→    func fetchPrograms(
   137→        trainerId: String? = nil,
   138→        category: String? = nil,
   139→        limit: Int = 50
   140→    ) async throws -> CMSProgramListResponse {
   141→        var components = URLComponents(url: configuration.baseURL.appendingPathComponent("/api/programs"), resolvingAgainstBaseURL: true)!
   142→        components.queryItems = [
   143→            URLQueryItem(name: "limit", value: String(limit))
   144→        ]
   145→        if let trainerId, !trainerId.isEmpty {
   146→            components.queryItems?.append(URLQueryItem(name: "trainerId", value: trainerId))
   147→        }
   148→        if let category, !category.isEmpty {
   149→            components.queryItems?.append(URLQueryItem(name: "category", value: category))
   150→        }
   151→        guard let url = components.url else { throw CMSServiceError.invalidURL }
   152→        let request = try await buildRequest(url: url, method: "GET")
   153→        return try await execute(request: request)
   154→    }
   155→
   156→    /// GET /api/programs/[id] — Program details.
   157→    func fetchProgram(id: String) async throws -> CMSProgram {
   158→        let url = configuration.baseURL.appendingPathComponent("/api/programs/\(id)")
   159→        let request = try await buildRequest(url: url, method: "GET")
   160→        return try await execute(request: request)
   161→    }
   162→
   163→    // MARK: - User Role API
   164→
   165→    /// POST /api/users/me — Ensure the current user has role "student" in the CMS.
   166→    /// This must be called before attempting to connect with a trainer.
   167→    func ensureStudentRole(displayName: String) async throws {
   168→        let url = configuration.baseURL.appendingPathComponent("/api/users/me")
   169→        var request = try await buildRequest(url: url, method: "POST", requiresAuth: true)
   170→        let body: [String: String] = ["role": "student", "displayName": displayName]
   171→        request.httpBody = try encoder.encode(body)
   172→        let response: CMSUserProfileResponse = try await execute(request: request)
   173→        #if DEBUG
   174→        print("[CMSTrainerService] ensureStudentRole succeeded — uid: \(response.uid), role: \(response.role ?? "nil")")
   175→        #endif
   176→    }
   177→
   178→    // MARK: - Private Helpers
   179→
   180→    private func buildRequest(url: URL, method: String, requiresAuth: Bool = false) async throws -> URLRequest {
   181→        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
   182→        request.httpMethod = method
   183→        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
   184→        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Accept")
   185→
   186→        if requiresAuth {
   187→            if let tokenProvider {
   188→                let token = try await tokenProvider()
   189→                request.setValue("Bearer \(token)", forHTTPHeaderField: "Authorization")
   190→            } else if let apiKey = configuration.apiKey {
   191→                request.setValue("Bearer \(apiKey)", forHTTPHeaderField: "Authorization")
   192→            }
   193→        }
   194→
   195→        return request
   196→    }
   197→
   198→    private func execute<T: Decodable>(request: URLRequest) async throws -> T {
   199→        #if DEBUG
   200→        print("[CMSTrainerService] \(request.httpMethod ?? "GET") \(request.url?.absoluteString ?? "")")
   201→        #endif
   202→
   203→        let (data, response) = try await session.data(for: request)
   204→
   205→        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
   206→            throw CMSServiceError.invalidResponse
   207→        }
   208→
   209→        #if DEBUG
   210→        print("[CMSTrainerService] Status: \(httpResponse.statusCode)")
   211→        #endif
   212→
   213→        switch httpResponse.statusCode {
   214→        case 200...299:
   215→            do {
   216→                return try decoder.decode(T.self, from: data)
   217→            } catch {
   218→                #if DEBUG
   219→                print("[CMSTrainerService] Decode error: \(error)")
   220→                if let json = String(data: data, encoding: .utf8) {
   221→                    print("[CMSTrainerService] Response: \(json.prefix(500))")
   222→                }
   223→                #endif
   224→                throw CMSServiceError.decodingFailed(error)
   225→            }
   226→        case 401:
   227→            #if DEBUG
   228→            if let body = String(data: data, encoding: .utf8) {
   229→                print("[CMSTrainerService] 401 body: \(body.prefix(500))")
   230→            }
   231→            #endif
   232→            throw CMSServiceError.unauthorized
   233→        case 403:
   234→            #if DEBUG
   235→            if let body = String(data: data, encoding: .utf8) {
   236→                print("[CMSTrainerService] 403 body: \(body.prefix(500))")
   237→            }
   238→            #endif
   239→            throw CMSServiceError.forbidden
   240→        case 404: throw CMSServiceError.notFound
   241→        case 429: throw CMSServiceError.rateLimited
   242→        case 500...599: throw CMSServiceError.serverError(httpResponse.statusCode)
   243→        default:
   244→            if let apiError = try? decoder.decode(CMSAPIError.self, from: data) {
   245→                throw CMSServiceError.apiError(apiError)
   246→            }
   247→            throw CMSServiceError.unexpectedStatus(httpResponse.statusCode)
   248→        }
   249→    }
   250→}
   251→
